entries.section: Leveling as a Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: You're very durable when completing solo content, since you can heal, deal decent single-target damage, and wear plate, allowing you to mitigate things quite well.

entries.section: Leveling as a Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: You can throw a shield on and effectively tank the occasional dungeon using Righteous Fury for threat generation. You may not be as effective in mitigation as a Protection Paladin , but you generate plenty of threat and can survive just fine with a half-decent healer.

sections.heading: Leveling as a Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Judgement of Wisdom on pull to help with mana sustain if needed. Keep it up on any boss targets for your group.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Auto-attack with your seal active.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Crusader Strike on cooldown. You can also use Exorcism if the enemy is Undead or a Demon.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Judgement of Command is not something you want to use on cooldown for mana reasons, but it does gain extra damage from Hammer of Justice or Repentance .

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: After combat, top yourself off with Flash of Light if needed, then drink your mana to full.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Judgement of Wisdom on the pull to help with mana sustain if needed. Keep it up on any boss targets for your group.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Consecration for big AoE groups if you have the mana. Consider down-ranking the spell to Rank 3 or Rank 4, or even lower, if mana is a problem.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Cast Judgment on the pull to generate snap threat. Then use it on cooldown to build threat on targets who may not be in your immediate range.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use your auto-attack with seal active to generate threat.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Exorcism on cooldown against Undead and Demon targets.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Consecration on cooldown if you have the mana to generate threat on AoE groups.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Crusader Strike generates an okay amount of threat, the slower your weapon is the more threat it will generate.

sections.heading: Leveling Rotation for Retribution Paladin DPS in Burning Crusade

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Try to keep Judgement of Wisdom when leveling solo if mana is a concern. This will really help your efficiency, as you won't have to stop to drink as frequently.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Generally, you will find Blessing of Wisdom more beneficial than Blessing of Might , thanks to reducing downtime.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Try to only heal between mobs, since you want to get the most out of that one heal, and this will prevent pushback on your spellcasting.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Consecration will obliterate your mana pool, and you should try to avoid using it in most situations in solo content or downrank it.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Despite not being a tank spec, you can tank any lower-level dungeon with ease. This will make finding groups much easier and allow you to advertise yourself as a tank. Although not necessarily required, it is advised to have decently high stamina, a good spell-damage weapon or fast melee weapon, and a shield for tanking.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: You can also heal dungeons; though, unlike tanking, you will need at least some healing-focused gear with +healing power, mana regen, and intellect. You will almost exclusively use Flash of Light , with occasional Holy Light when the situation calls for it.

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Retribution Paladin DPS in TBC Classic
